name: Pacific Sports Exchange Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We were incorporated in Delaware on July 2, 2018, to engage in the business of reselling new and used tennis and golf equipment. We have since added used golf carts to our resale inventory and have begun engaging in consignment sales of tennis rackets. The concept is to source top-quality, in-demand equipment, and resell it to both domestic and international customers.
